steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage defines land art, then highlights its wildly diverse methods of creation, then gives two concrete examples of that diversity. The question asks what structural role the passage plays.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — The text compares two works of art, then provides details about the lives of the artists who created them.: the passage contains no biographical information about individual artists. ✗
  • Choice B — The text conveys a definition of a kind of art, then addresses a well-established criticism of the art.: the passage does not criticize land art. ✗
  • Choice C — The text outlines a common misconception about a kind of art, then offers an explanation for why that misconception persists.: the passage does not identify or address any misconception. ✗
  • Choice D — The text describes a particular genre of art, then cites examples illustrating an important characteristic of that genre.: the passage defines land art, identifies diversity as its defining trait, and supplies two examples — a direct match. ✓
D is correct.
